ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "voyage_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the voyage started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the voyage ended */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ship on which the voyage took place */,
  "historical_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical event associated with the voyage */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken by the ship during the voyage */,
  "number_of_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on board */,
  "number_of_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on board */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_historical_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("historical_event_id") REFERENCES historical_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship (e.g., ocean liner, cargo ship) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Passenger capacity of the ship */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company that owns the ship */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ship in meters */,
  "beam" REAL /* Beam of the ship in meters */,
  "gross_tonnage" INTEGER /* Gross tonnage of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the historical event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the historical event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the historical event (e.g., maritime disaster, war) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the historical event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embarkation point */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the embarkation point is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_voyage_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_voyage_association_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_embarkation" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation entry */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "embarkation_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embarkation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_embarkation_embarkation_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_point_id") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Organization providing the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_voyage_association" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voyage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_voyage_association_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_voyage_association_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
